message:
feat(tests): add 13 SEC-5.2 trust onboarding and kill-switch tests (bd-ww5br)

Tests cover: full onboarding wizard flow, emergency kill-switch halting,
audit trail provenance, re-onboarding after kill-switch, alert filtering,
multi-extension independent trust tracking, kill-switch alert schema,
risk disclosure recording, mid-onboarding kill-switch, repeated incidents,
alert sequence monotonicity, JSON field completeness, and exhaustive
hostcall gating coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
